name: @niivue/nv-ohif
description: NiiVue viewport extension for the OHIF Viewer (render series with NiiVue: 3D volume rendering, meshes, overlays, multiplanar, drawing).

scripts.build:lib: NODE_ENV=production bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --format=esm --external react --external react-dom --external @niivue/niivue --external @niivue/dcm2niix --external dcmjs
scripts.build:package: bun run build:lib && bun run build:types

comment:peers: The host OHIF app (>= 3.12, React 18) provides @ohif/core, @ohif/extension-default and react-dom. They are intentionally NOT peerDependencies here: bun would install the whole OHIF tree (pinned to react-dom 18) into this monorepo, colliding with @niivue/nvreact (React 19). This package builds against local OHIF typings (src/ohif-types.ts) and externalizes react. The react peer allows 18 or 19 so bun reuses the monorepo's React 19 for dev; the component's simple hook usage is compatible with both, and the OHIF host supplies React 18 at runtime.
comment:dcm2niix-pin: DCM2NIIX_PIN: DICOM conversion needs the dcm2niix Web-Worker exit fix (wrap callMain in try/catch, read err.status). It is NOT in any published @niivue/dcm2niix (1.2.0 / 1.3.0-dev.0 both lack it), so DICOM does not work for npm-install consumers yet. When a fixed release ships, bump the range below to >=<that version>. See README '## DICOM support'.
